questions.question: Why did the Trump administration order Anthropic to block foreign users from its latest AI models?
options: Because of concerns about a possible jailbreak
questions.explanation: The order followed concerns that a prompt could bypass the models' safety protections.

questions.question: According to the article, what became clear after the order?
options: The American government can determine who accesses the world's leading AI
questions.explanation: The incident demonstrated that access to frontier AI ultimately depends on decisions made by the US government.

questions.question: Why does the article compare AI to nuclear technology and cryptography?
options: All three were invented at the same time
They create difficult trade-offs between security and openness
questions.explanation: The article argues that frontier AI raises similar strategic dilemmas about sharing advanced technologies.

questions.question: What concern does the article raise about open-weight AI models?
options: They are too expensive to train
They could spread advanced capabilities widely
questions.explanation: Open-weight models may allow powerful capabilities to proliferate beyond their creators' control.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the first section?
options: America has lost its technological advantage
AI has become a new source of American geopolitical power
Open-source AI has replaced commercial AI
questions.explanation: The article argues that frontier AI gives the United States significant new leverage.
